education.details: Fairleigh S. Dickinson, Jr. Global Manager Award

bullets: Modeled the lead-to-demo funnel in SQL across CRM and outbound-activity data, exposing speed-to-lead and routing gaps in a Tableau dashboard; rebuilt routing and ICP segmentation on the findings, lifting lead-to-demo conversion 30%.
Ran cohort analysis to compare conversion by segment, prioritizing India as a high-opportunity growth market.
Designed and analyzed A/B tests on outbound messaging, selecting winning variants that lifted LinkedIn acceptance rates to 25%+.
Led 40+ C-suite discovery interviews to pressure-test the ICP, surfacing pain points that reshaped the product roadmap.
Analyzed self-serve product telemetry to pinpoint activation drop-off, informing the activation framework in Glidely's product-led-growth motion.
Built segment-specific outbound messaging and playbooks to open new buyer segments, more than doubling booked meetings (from ~10/week to as many as 5/day) and lifting outbound acceptance above 25%.

Ran discovery with 40+ C-suite prospects to sharpen the ICP and messaging; rebuilt self-serve onboarding and funnel dashboards (SQL, Tableau), lifting signup conversion 75% and lead-to-demo conversion ~30%.
Rebuilt self-serve onboarding messaging and activation flows, running experiments on the signup funnel (SQL, Tableau) that lifted self-serve signup conversion 75% and lead-to-demo conversion ~30%.
Ran discovery with 40+ C-suite prospects to sharpen the ICP and messaging; built segment-specific acquisition playbooks that more than doubled booked meetings (from ~10/week to ~5/day).
Ran discovery with 40+ C-suite prospects to sharpen the ICP and messaging, reprioritizing the product roadmap around validated pain points.
Built segment-specific outbound messaging and playbooks, more than doubling booked meetings (from ~10/week to ~5/day); rebuilt self-serve onboarding (SQL, Tableau), lifting signup conversion 75%.

Spearheaded 40+ structured discovery conversations with C-suite prospects to pressure-test the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), validating critical buyer pain points that directly shifted the cross-functional product roadmap.
Accelerated top-of-funnel pipeline velocity by authoring segment-specific outbound messaging frameworks and localized sales playbooks, lifting LinkedIn outbound acceptance rates to 25%+.
Optimized the lead-to-demo pipeline to drive a 30% lift in baseline conversion by engineering real-time funnel analytics dashboards via SQL and Tableau to diagnose system bottlenecks.
Formulated a scalable PLG user-activation and API monetization framework, resulting in a 75% increase in self-serve signup conversions by aligning product telemetry with targeted marketing sequences.
Defined named-account segmentation and targeting criteria for multi-channel ABM across 50+ countries, driving a 28% conversion uplift across 100+ enterprise banking clients.
Built and measured named-account targeting parameters and outbound cadence performance in Salesforce and Eloqua to guide pipeline prioritization.
Designed Finacle's first pulse-analytics measurement strategy, lifting brand recall 2.4x and earning the Best Internal Campaign Award.
Ran competitive analysis feeding battlecards and monetization deep-dives for 50+ account executives, cutting sales-cycle length 15%.
Orchestrated 10+ executive roundtables and client briefings that deepened relationships and accelerated late-stage deals.

Managed ABM for 100+ enterprise banking clients across 50+ markets - built the segmentation, named-account targeting, and multi-channel messaging (Salesforce, Eloqua) that drove a 28% conversion lift on ~$25M of influenced pipeline.

Managed funnel metrics end to end (MQL→SQL, conversion, pipeline velocity), launched Finacle's first internal pulse-analytics dashboard (SQL, Tableau) to attribute impact - won the Best Internal Campaign Award.
Ran 10+ executive roundtables and customer briefings and equipped 50+ account executives with battlecards and competitive one-pagers, cutting enterprise sales-cycle length ~15%.

Owned acquisition and lifecycle marketing for 100+ enterprise banking clients across 50+ markets - built segmentation and messaging (Salesforce, Eloqua) that drove a 28% conversion lift on ~$25M of influenced pipeline.
Built Finacle's first pulse-analytics dashboard (SQL, Tableau) to measure campaign performance and communicate results to senior leadership, winning the Best Internal Campaign Award.
Created battlecards and monetization deep-dives for 50+ account executives across banking markets, cutting sales-cycle length ~15%.
Developed B2B go-to-market for 100+ enterprise banking clients across 50+ markets - segmentation, messaging, (Salesforce, Eloqua) driving a 28% conversion lift on ~$25M of influenced pipeline.

Built the seller-facing content engine - battlecards, competitive one-pagers, case studies, and monetization deep-dives - equipping 50+ account executives and cutting enterprise sales-cycle length ~15%.

Partnered cross-functionally to run 10+ executive roundtables and customer briefings; launched Finacle's first pulse-analytics dashboard to measure program impact, winning the Best Internal Campaign Award.

Surpassed global pipeline distribution targets by executing multi-channel account-based marketing (ABM) campaigns across 50+ countries, securing a 28% conversion uplift across 100+ enterprise banking clients.
Collaborated with enterprise sales leadership to accelerate pipeline growth, utilizing Salesforce and Eloqua to design named-account targeting parameters and structured outbound follow-up cadences.
Cultivated high-value executive relationships and accelerated late-stage deals by orchestrating 10+ executive roundtables and customer briefings, securing a sustainable customer retention loop.
Amplified market share and data-driven brand positioning by 2.4x in brand recall, designing Finacle's first pulse-analytics strategy using SQL and Tableau to capture the Best Internal Campaign Award.
Equipped 50+ global account executives with competitive battlecards and product monetization deep-dives, reducing the sales cycle length by 15% through formalized sales enablement asset deployments.
Ran quantitative win/loss analysis and competitive benchmarking across enterprise deals, identifying loss drivers and sharpening positioning that lifted competitive win-rates 10%.
Delivered 80+ executive presentations to CIOs and CTOs across EMEA, APAC, and North America, tailoring each to client priorities and decision criteria.
Authored thought-leadership content and executive briefings that grew website engagement 40% and strengthened pipeline quality.

Drove multi-channel GTM for the launch of Zero Incident Framework - owned content and enablement and delivered 80+ tailored CIO/CTO presentations across EMEA, APAC, & North America; 35 advanced to POC.
Authored technical thought-leadership content that grew site engagement 40% and improved inbound lead quality; ran win/loss analysis that lifted competitive win rates ~10%.
Drove go-to-market for the launch of ZIF (Zero Incident Framework), Neurealm's flagship product - owned messaging, content, and enablement, and delivered 80+ tailored CIO/CTO presentations.
Ran win/loss analysis and competitive positioning that lifted win rates ~10%.

Drove go-to-market for the launch of ZIF (Zero Incident Framework), Neurealm's flagship product - owned launch messaging, content, and sales enablement, and delivered 80+ tailored presentations to enterprise CIOs/CTOs across EMEA, APAC, and North America; 35 advanced to POC with Sales.
Led competitive positioning and win/loss analysis that lifted competitive win rates ~10%; authored technical thought-leadership content that grew site engagement 40%.
Influenced cross-regional software procurement decisions across EMEA, APAC, and North America by delivering 80+ tailored product presentations to enterprise CIOs and CTOs.

Catalyzed a 40% expansion in digital website engagement and elevated inbound pipeline quality by authoring technical thought-leadership content, executive briefing materials, and product point-of-view (POV) articles.
Sharpened global competitive positioning strategies, yielding a 10% lift in competitive win-rates by directing comprehensive win/loss analyses and rigorous product benchmarking studies.
Coordinated cross-functional product launch strategies alongside Product Management and Engineering teams, establishing optimized frameworks to drive immediate target monetization post-release.
Built an impact-measurement framework across 20+ partnerships and 50M+ impressions, driving 200% growth in program reach.
Ran conversion-rate-optimization analysis across donor-acquisition funnels to raise ~$35K through digital campaigns.
Unified operational frameworks across marketing, legal, and finance, earning the YES League of Excellency Award.
Scaled integrated multi-channel campaigns across 20+ partnerships to 50M+ impressions and ~$35K raised, using conversion-rate optimization on acquisition funnels.
Ran donor-acquisition campaigns across 20+ partnerships to 50M+ impressions and ~$35K raised, using A/B testing and conversion-rate optimization on acquisition funnels.
Scaled multi-channel campaigns across 20+ partnerships to 50M+ impressions and ~$35K raised through conversion-rate optimization on acquisition funnels.
Multiplied organizational digital footprints by 200%, securing 50M+ impressions across digital channels by scaling integrated, multi-channel GTM programs across 20+ non-profit partnerships.
Generated ~$35K USD in online capital acquisition campaigns, implementing rigorous conversion-rate optimization (CRO) methodologies across donor acquisition funnels.
Unified cross-functional operational frameworks across marketing, legal, and finance divisions, earning the prestigious YES League of Excellency Award for measurable project delivery impact.

summaries: Marketing and business analyst with 6 years of experience turning customer, funnel, and campaign data into growth decisions across enterprise SaaS and fintech, backed by a STEM MBA in Business Analytics & Machine Learning.
B2B product marketer with 6 years of experience in banking/fintech and a STEM MBA in business analytics & machine learning.
Full-stack B2B product marketer with a STEM MBA. Six years of experience turning customer insight into seller-facing GTM, launch content, and analytics-driven sales enablement.

Data-driven B2B Go-to-Market (GTM) and technology professional with an MBA in Business Analytics and a proven track record of accelerating pipeline growth. Expert in crafting high-impact product positioning, localized messaging frameworks, and executing multi-channel account-based marketing (ABM) campaigns. Highly skilled in cross-functional collaboration, full-funnel data analytics, and conducting strategic discovery to capture buyer insights and scale market expansion.
